Bus Timings

94 Bus Schedule Wahat Al Karamah to Mamsha Al Saadiyat

June 21, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 94 plays a crucial role in Abu Dhabi’s public transportation network, serving as a vital link that connects Wahat Al Karamah with Mamsha Al Saadiyat. This essential route caters to both daily commuters and tourists, facilitating convenient access to prominent landmarks, bustling residential areas, and cultural attractions throughout the city.

Bus Timings

Bus 94 runs regularly throughout the day with frequent intervals, beginning as early as 05:39 and extending until 21:40, departing from the Wahat Al Karamah station. This extensive schedule provides convenient travel choices for passengers across Abu Dhabi.

From Wahat Al Karamah From Mamsha Al Saadiyat
05:39 05:35
05:50 06:05
06:10 06:35
06:40 07:05
06:59 07:35
07:09 08:05
07:22 08:35
07:38 09:05
07:53 09:35
08:13 10:05
08:40 10:35
09:02 11:05
09:38 11:35
09:59 12:05
10:38 12:35
11:01 13:05
11:31 13:35
12:09 14:05
12:37 14:35
13:07 15:05
13:36 15:35
13:53 16:05
14:24 16:35
15:07 17:05
15:36 17:35
15:57 18:05
16:23 18:35
16:37 19:05
16:52 19:35
17:06 20:05
17:20 20:35
17:37 21:05
17:51 21:35
18:08 22:05
18:24 22:35
18:40 23:05
19:02  
19:27  
20:09  
20:42  
21:14  
21:40  

Download PDF Bus 94

Bus 94 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or access this link for the 94 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The Bus 94 route includes stops at the following locations:

  1. Wahat Al Karamah

  2. Wahat Al Karamah

3.

4.

  1. Ministry of Interior

  2. Al Noor Hospital

  3. Zayed Sports Stadium

  4. Mzaham Street

  5. Saif Ghobash Street

  6. General Civil Aviation Authority

  7. Health Authority Abu Dhabi

  8. Sheikh Rashid Bin Saeed Street

  9. Al Reehan Public Garden

  10. Abu Dhabi Coop

  11. Dhafeer Street

  12. Al Zafaranah Health Centre

  13. Rabdan Street

  14. Jibreel Mosque

  15. Al Dhafra Street

  16. Al Ansab Street

  17. Masjid Othman Bin Affan

  18. Masjid Hamza Bin Abdul Mutalib

  19. Al Sad Street

  20. Dihan Street

  21. Abu Dhabi Mens College

  22. Al Jazeera Sports Club

  1. ECSSR

  3. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street

  4. Abu Dhabi Bus Station

  5. Masjid Salim Ghabish Khamis

  6. Mariam Bint Said Mosque

  7. Al Falah Street

  8. Central Post Office

  9. Gold Center

  10. Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre

  11. Zayed The First Street

  12. Ministry of Economy

  13. Al Mariah Mall

  14. Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Street

  15. Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque

  16. The Club

  17. Saadiyat Beach Gate B

  18. Saadiyat Louvre

  19. Mamsha Al Saadiyat

Other bus routes in Abu Dhabi that you can check out include the 67 bus route, which travels from Al Reem Shams to Marina Mall.

Also See: Bus F17 in Dubai: Route Highlights and Important Stops

Bus Ticket Price

While the exact fare depends on distance traveled, expect the Abu Dhabi route 94 bus to cost around AED 4 which is typical for standard routes. For the most accurate price, use a Hafilat Smart Card (info on the Department of Transport website) or ask the bus driver upon boarding.

Bus Booking

While online booking options specific to Bus 94 may not be available, passengers can easily access information on schedules and stops through various Abu Dhabi public transport apps and websites. Physical ticket purchases are available at bus stations and select outlets.

Journey Experience

Taking bus route 94 from Wahat Al Karamah to Mamsha Al Saadiyat offers a scenic journey through Abu Dhabi’s highlights. Starting at Wahat Al Karamah, a memorial honoring the UAE’s martyrs, the trip reflects national pride.

Finally, arriving at Mamsha Al Saadiyat, you can enjoy the beautiful beachfront promenade that connects cultural landmarks like the Louvre Abu Dhabi, making it perfect for a leisurely stroll along the Arabian Gulf while soaking in the artistic ambiance of the area.

Read More: Abu Dhabi Bus 67: Detailed Route and Stop Information

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, travelers can conveniently reach Mamsha Al Saadiyat, the terminus of the 94 bus route starting from Wahat Al Karamah, at a fare ranging from AED 61 to 74. This option provides a flexible and comfortable way to explore the vibrant cultural and recreational offerings of Abu Dhabi’s renowned beachfront destination.

Bus 94 stands out as a dependable and cost-effective option for navigating Abu Dhabi’s diverse landscape, ensuring seamless travel experiences for both residents and visitors alike.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 21, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
